response.justification: Bogdan is a deeply experienced staff-level generalist (~19 years) with strong TypeScript/Node, solid engineering craft, and current hands-on work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling — a direct hit on one of the role's key technologies. However, the role's core requirement is 8+ years building production AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience spans roughly one year; there is no evidence of Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, evaluation pipelines, or deep cloud AI-system design. He fits the engineering-excellence and mentoring dimensions well but falls well short of the GenAI depth the role demands.
strengths: Current hands-on experience with MCP servers and agentic-workflow infrastructure at re:cinq
19 years of broad production engineering (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK, Kubernetes) with staff-level scope
Proven mentor and communicator — workshops, conference talks, and multi-module courses suggest customer-facing capability
concerns: Only ~1 year of AI-related work versus the required 8+ years building production AI solutions
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or Python
Cloud experience appears incidental (AWS CDK for pricing work) rather than designing AI systems on major cloud platforms

key_factors.factor: AI experience depth far below 8-year requirement
No RAG, vector database, or Python evidence
MCP and agentic tooling work plus staff-level engineering breadth
